description: The VoiceModeSync component only works in userspace. It allows for getting the status of the user's chosen voice mode options and if they can use certain modes.

fields.FocusedWorldVoiceMode: The voice mode set for the current world.
fields.GlobalMute: Whether the user is muted for everyone.
fields.FocusedWorldMaxAllowedVoiceMode: The maximum voice mode their allowed by the role the user has in the current focused world.
fields.BroadcastAllowed: Whether broadcast is allowed for the user voice modes for the user in the currently focused world.
fields.ShoutAllowed: Whether shout is allowed for the user voice modes for the user in the currently focused world.
fields.NormalAllowed: Whether normal is allowed for the user voice modes for the user in the currently focused world.
fields.WhisperAllowed: Whether whisper is allowed for the user voice modes for the user in the currently focused world.

usage: Attach to a slot that would exist in userspace, such as a facet. From there, the fields will update depending on the currently focused world.
